title: IlMusu's Enchantments
description:
This mod adds more enchantments to Minecraft.  
It also includes a new mechanic, referred to as "Demonic Enchanting", for making enchanting a little bit more interesting without twisting the game too much.
body: # ILMUSU'S ENCHANTMENTS MOD This mod adds more enchantments to Minecraft. It also includes a new mechanic, called Demonic Enchanting, for making enchanting a little bit more interesting without twisting the game too much (and can be disabled through the configuration file). All the information about mechanics and enchantments can be found here: [IlMusuEnchantments Wiki](https://github.com/IlMusu/IlMusuEnchantmentsMod) There is configuration for the mod at the following path: [minecraft_folder]/config/musuen/mod.properties It is possible to disable and modify the min and max levels of every enchantment singularly with a configuration file located at the following path: [minecraft_folder]/config/musuen/enchantments.properties
